calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Fix Amount Of Atty'S Fees Awardable As Item Of Costs
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Harold Auerbach, Esq. for Plaintiff First Reserve Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant for order fixing and rewarding attorney fees.
Attorney's fees of $5,060.00

Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd. (Attorney'S Fee).
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Robert Pollak, Esq. for Plaintiff, Robert Hagopian as witness also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant(s) eWORLDMEDIA, INC.; RONALD TOUCHARD; HENNING MORALES.
Principal of $52,209.28
Costs of $339.50
Interest of $2,616.90. For the total of $55,165.68.
Attorney Fees to be by motion, per Court.
Judgment signed in open court.
